name: Fishborg Planter
name_jp: フィッシュボーグ－プランター
desc: Once, while this card is in the GY: You can send the top card of your Deck to the GY, then, if it is a WATER monster, Special Summon this card from the GY. You can only use this effect of "Fishborg Planter" once per turn.
mnst_eff: Once, while this card is in the GY: You can send the top card of your Deck to the GY, then, if it is a WATER monster, Special Summon this card from the GY. You can only use this effect of "Fishborg Planter" once per turn.
eff: Once, while this card is in the GY: You can send the top card of your Deck to the GY, then, if it is a WATER monster, Special Summon this card from the GY. You can only use this effect of "Fishborg Planter" once per turn.

sets.set: Speed Duel: Attack from the Deep

action: Sends from the top of your Deck to your Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
